gist.headline: A new Llama in the garden
gist.blurb: We've added Meta's shiny new Llama 3.3 70B Instruct to the text generation API. Just call the `llama` model and let the fireworks begin.
gist.summary: Added Meta Llama 3.3 70B Instruct to the text generation API via Fireworks.
gist.impact: Developers can now access the highly capable Llama 3.3 70B model by specifying `llama` in their text generation requests.
gist.visual_concept: A cute pixel art llama representing the new Llama 3.3 model, accompanied by Polly the bee. The 'Fireworks' provider is represented by literal soft, cozy fireworks in the sky.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky, fluffy pixel art llama sitting together in a digital garden, watching soft pastel fireworks in the night sky. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, chunky sprites, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky, fluffy pixel art llama sitting together in a digital garden, watching soft pastel fireworks in the night sky. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, chunky sprites, emotionally warm.
